feed.title: AO3 - Dick Grayson/Jason Todd (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Dick Grayson/Jason Todd on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: He died
entry.summary:
Author: hekou

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,271Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 7

Summary: He was dead. Jason found out while he was reading. With Dick. Meeting Dick had been an accident. He didn’t know why a cop from Blüdhaven would show up in the East End, why he’d answer a Gothamite’s call, why he’d knock on Jason’s door. All he knew was that he didn’t need him. Not that Dick was lacking in any way—quite the opposite. He was too good, so good that it scared Jason. The last person who had been this good to him was Roman. Roman Sionis. His foster father, his boss, his pitiful, accidentally dead husband.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The City of Black and White Turned Red
entry.summary:
Author: blessingsblessing

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,454Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 8

Summary: This is a story that follows a military brat turned detective in one of the most dangerous, disfunctional cities in the world. One day she is met with a new case, a drug bust gone wrong. There's more than meets the eye. A dangerous anti-hero? New high tech drugs? Drug wars? Her normal crazy was going to get a lot crazier as she finds herself right in the middle of the most dangerous, world changing case in the city.

entry.title: Nightwing: A Setting Sun - Lasting Dawn; The Misery Years, End
entry.summary:
Author: InkBlot31

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,350Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 3

Summary: He walked out, swapping to find the bathroom where a cluster of spiders had laid an egg sacks by the toilet.Images of shower sex and sensual touches had the merc run to the bowl, seeing his reflection as he turned to the wall. Slamming his face into it. To stop the faces, the pain….pain was all that was left, why did he find it? Why, whywhywhy!!? Waking up a bit later, the factor found him unharmed, his skull throbbing as he scrambled to see if Dick had escaped. To his joy, no. No…his Robin was, tenderly asleep upon the dirtied sofa. He looked at it, the idea of HIS Robin being filthy disgusted the man. Stepping closer, that would not do in the slightest as the boy was hauled off for a warm soak.

entry.title: I'll Build You Back (Somehow)
entry.summary:
Author: WakingNightmares

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 89,716Chapters: 16/16Kudos: 680

Summary: Jason gives him an exasperated look as they get to the front door. “Seriously, Dick. I’m fine. Promise. I’ve had a helluva lot worse than this, and still managed a patrol, with a lot less sleep than this. I’ll take it easy, keep the ass-kickin’ to a minimum tonight, alright?” He says with a grin. And fuck the things Dick would do for that grin. It erases the hard edges, the cold and calculating Red Hood, leaving behind a mischievous looking young man, rather than a younger version of Bruce. So he sighs. “Fine. Just call me if you need anything, okay? I’m gonna be in town for a few days anyways, until we get this Two-Face thing figured out, so it’s not like it’s out of my way,” Dick says as he steps outside into the driveway. “Besides, it’d be nice to hang out more often.” Jason gives Dick an unsure look, and for a moment, Dick can feel his heart sink a bit. Did Jason not enjoy their breakfast? Dick had intruded, to be fair, but Jason had seemed to enjoy - “Yeah? You wanna hang?”

entry.title: To Become a Breeding Vessel
entry.summary:
Author: sarriathmg

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,310Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 135

Summary: “Oh, little brother…” The Dick-thing comes closer, its voice chillingly familiar, resulting in goosebumps. “I’ve wanted to do this for such a long time…”Jason doesn’t know what kind of species the Dick-thing is. A thing that mimics humans for most of its life, who hides so well amongst them that Jason, and even Bruce and Alfred, had never known. The disgust with Dick’s inhumanness comes together with the horror of having worked with this monster, having inhabited the same spaces with it. Having filled its shoes, even idolized it when he was still young; still impressionable.So Jason is too stunned to provide a struggle when the flesh grows tighter, secreting clear fluid from its thick skin that soaks through Jason’s uniform.“Oh, baby brother… You don’t need clothes with what I’m about to do to you…”

entry.summary:

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,483Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 39

entry.title: The Stray
entry.summary:
Author: Rustycrunch

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,960Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 7

Summary: Gotham does not forgive, and it does not forget. Neither does Samira Jimenez, local graduate student and local wannabe vigilante. When her father, a district attorney who dared to believe in a reformed city, is murdered, Samira is left with nothing but grief, a coin she cannot place, and a dangerous name whispered between criminals in the dark: Red Hood. Trained in the shadows by a cat-loving mentor who showed her what Gotham was really made of, Samira learned that trust often came with a cost. Her pain had no room in these dark streets. And finding out the truth of her father's murder could lead her down a path that she'd spent her life fighting against. But Gotham's truths are never simple, and the man she has been hunting is not the killer she imagined. In a city where every light casts a longer shadow, Samira must decide what justice really means and how much of herself she is willing to lose to find it.

entry.summary:

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,196Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 37

entry.title: Blind Faith
entry.summary:
Author: dreamingvanity

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 296,115Chapters: 38/?Kudos: 248

Summary: It's no one's fault but his own that Dick is sitting there now, cold and utterly miserable, and very close to freezing to death. It's no one's fault but his own that he let his heart and mind get away again. It's no one's fault but his own that he wanted for someone who couldn't and wouldn't be his, and Wally is right. Dick needs to get back to his life, start over and make new friends. That's all, nothing more and nothing less. Friends, Dick needs friends, and sadly (according to Wally), Krypto isn't enough.

entry.title: Decadent Elegy on the Rusted Edge
entry.summary:
Author: Lucerne3149D

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,855Chapters: 5/10Kudos: 60

Summary: Dick Grayson once believed that hard work alone could change his fate. By day, he is a top student in the criminal justice program at community college; by night, he wipes down the bar at a rundown tavern on the edge of the city just to survive. Heavy debt is slowly grinding away his pride.Until Jason Todd appears.The cold, arrogant, and wildly wealthy heir uses two thousand dollars to buy one night with him. That night, money and desire collide in raw, naked heat.From cold transactions to fierce confrontations, then to gradually uncontrollable possession and redemption — the two become entangled again and again on the edge.They both thought they could control the game, but they never expected that a decadent elegy of class, desire, and downfall had already begun to play.

entry.title: Common Grounds
entry.summary:
Author: MewSefet

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 42,588Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 305

Summary: What happens when you accidently start dating your son's English teacher? When Dick and Jason find themselves pushed together on a rainy day in their usual coffee shop, neither of them expect their lives are already intertwined. How casual flirting and mutual interest turns into dating, turns into an identity reveal that neither of them expect, but should have figured out earlier. Eg. the Detective!Dick Grayson/Teacher!Jason Todd fic that no one asked for. Including Jason is Damian's teacher, and Damian is 80% Dick's son and identity shenanigans in a Civillian!AU.

entry.title: the miraculous torture of jason todd
entry.summary:
Author: nux_myristica

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,435Chapters: 8/9Kudos: 372

Summary: It's not the job that goes wrong, oh no. It's the few moments after, as Jason speeds down Gotham streets on his motorcycle. It has nothing to do with Dick's absolutely bizarre bet with Steph about whether or not he can twerk while driving his bike. Clearly, Dick has no part in why Jason breaks his leg whatsoever. Jason did NOT see that and did NOT drive straight into a metal railing on the road because he was so damn distracted, no sir!Lies, lies, all lies.But Jason won't say any of this to Dick. Can't say no to Dick, either. Which is why Jason ends up at Dick's apartment instead of the manor to heal, living and breathing a perpetual nightmare-turned-wet-dream.

entry.title: sometimes, you get the girl (sometimes, you get the song)
entry.summary:
Author: bavariansugarcookie

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,529Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 69

Summary: “Did Dick take care of you while I was gone?” Jason murmured and Tim’s eyes flew open, his cheeks pink. He glanced over at Dick, and Dick remembered Tim giving him that same look when he found Tim huddled in the shower, the mirror so fogged the condensation was starting to drip down the glass.Dick could hear his own voice— “Jason would want you to feel good”—echo in his ears as he watched Jason’s eyes go dark as Tim nodded, suddenly shy.“God damn,” Jason breathed. “I thought about it every night.” Tim peeked at him through his eyelashes and Jason ran his thumb along Tim’s cheekbone. “Show me?”

entry.title: The Tragedy of Bruce Wayne
entry.summary:
Author: Gaynightwing03

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 94,878Chapters: 35/?Kudos: 1,482

Summary: After a devastating betrayal leaves Damian Wayne questioning everything he thought he knew about his family, Dick Grayson finds himself forced into a role he never expected: protector, advocate, and perhaps even father. As old wounds resurface and long-buried truths come to light, the Batfamily must confront not only what was done to Damian, but the patterns that have shaped all of their lives. Faced with impossible choices, they begin asking a question none of them ever dared consider before: What happens when the mission is no longer worth the cost?

entry.title: the faust paradox
entry.summary:
Author: albertacanuck

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,252Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 141

Summary: a magic trap requires a confession of a buried truth to open. unfortunately for jason and dick, they’re trapped together, and the universe doesn't care about their secrets until they finally start telling the truth. or: a veritas spell breaks jason's walls down, and dick isn't letting him run away this time.
